name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 浮木
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. It has been spray-painted using brown paint in a pattern resembling dried wood. Knock on wood; you're gonna need all the luck you can get - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把武器采用类似干燥木材的棕色图案进行了喷涂。 好运来！你会需要所有你能得到的运气。- 指挥官费利克斯·莱利
